entities.name: HETERODERA CAJANI
entities.description: A nematode pest that affects pigeonpea.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The host plant Cajanus cajan affected by Heterodera cajani.

entities.name: LIFE TABLE
entities.description: A tool used to analyze the life stages and population dynamics of H. cajani.

entities.name: 25 OC
entities.description: The temperature at which the life table for H. cajani was developed.

entities.name: MORTALITY RATES
entities.description: The rate of death across different life stages of H. cajani.

entities.name: EGG LAYING
entities.description: The process of producing eggs by H. cajani.

entities.name: MEAN GENERATION TIME
entities.description: The average time between generations of H. cajani.

entities.name: NET REPRODUCTIVE RATE
entities.description: The average number of offspring produced by an individual in its lifetime.

entities.name: TRUE INTRINSIC RATE
entities.description: The rate of population increase denoted as rm.

entities.name: FINITE RATE OF NATURAL INCREASE
entities.description: A measure of population growth over a specific time interval.
